questionHtml: Predict, with a reason, whether Cu or Cu2+ has the greater ionization energy.
markschemeHtml:
Cu2+ AND fewer shielding electrons/less electron-electron repulsion «from same nuclear charge»

OR

Cu2+ AND larger effective nuclear charge

OR

Cu2+ AND more energy required to remove electron from positive ion than neutral parent atom

OR

Cu2+ AND smaller radius

OR

Cu2+ AND electron is being lost from a lower energy/inner/3d orbital ✔

meta.title: Predict, with a reason, whether Cu or Cu2+ has the greater ionization energy.
